Official phone number for Connecticut PACE program not found in search results. Connecticut is evaluating PACE program fit as of April 2025 per state documentation; program status and application procedures may be in development.

verified.notes: No authoritative current income or asset limits found in search results; SNAP active in CT as of 2026 with work requirement changes to ages 18-64

verified.notes: Income eligibility is based on 60% of state median income by household size (not fixed monthly limits). Search results show household of 4 threshold ($75,052 annual) but do not provide specific monthly limits for households of 1 or 2. No age requirement found. Asset limit: no liquid assets test for 2025-2026. No single authoritative phone number for statewide applications found; residents must contact local Community Action Agencies by region. Official application portal: ct.gov/heatinghelp/apply.
